Meet the Coaches
Welcome to FATC
Meet the Coaches
By joining FATC, you're arming yourself with an awesome support system that you can
tap into for expert advice and strategic input. We've given you a bit of background on
each of our coaches below, so you know who they are when you're communicating
with them on the calls and in the group! Out of courtesy for our support crew, we ask
that all questions be posted to the group or on calls and not via private messages.
Lead Gen Coaches
Karen Sahetya*
Karen started her marketing career building strategies for leading apparel brands and
entertainment studios at all of the world's top retailers before founding her own
digital agency.
Since launching Brand Central Marketing, she's scaled medspas, gyms, dentists, yoga
studios, mortgage brokers, and more with ongoing results at 8x return on ad spend
for some clients.
Rutger Thole*
Rutger is known as the King of Bots and has already helped hundreds of marketers
and businesses to implement messenger bot strategies into their lead gen
campaigns.
Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
Contact Support
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

His recent wins include helping to generate over $100k in revenue for a new offer in a
two month period using a bot.
Michal Koziol
Michal is a geek and a nerd... but the type of nerd that can translate the nitty-gritty
technical and marketing stuff to a normal human-being language.
One of his success stories is turning $25k in spend into $150k in business for a client.
Michal loves automations, integrations and all the geeky stuff out there that helps
optimize funnels.
His side hobby - creating GIFs - resulting in 50million views of his GIFs. Some call him
The Gifsmaster.
Ecom Coaches
Alex Afterman
Prior to founding 11:11 Digital, Alex was Head of Audience Development for Future
Publishing PLC, an international digital publisher in the tech, gaming and
entertainment verticals.
Recent wins of Alex's include 8x ROAS for a high-end men's clothing client, delivering
$188k in revenue (on a $22k ad spend) for them in 4.5 months.
Amy Biddle
Amy Biddle is head of Luova Social. She's managed online sales and marketing for
companies in such diverse niches as SaaS to cat toys.
She helps both Amazon and Shopify brands scale using Facebook ads. Her campaigns
for clients have gotten consistently high ROAS, from 4x, 15x and higher.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

Cameron Walter
Cameron Walter formerly represented Facebook as a 'Facebook Marketing Expert',
and has worked with over 250 eCommerce companies.
Cameron has generated multi-millions in profit and business growth as a Facebook
marketer and now alternates between freelance work and managing the growth of his
own 6-figure eCommerce business.
Jordan Casoli
In early 2015, Jordan co-founded a skincare eCommerce company that he quickly grew
to $60k/month using Facebook ads as the primary traffic source.
Prior to that, he transitioned into full-time work as a Facebook ads freelancer
specializing in eCommerce, helping companies to launch products, scale campaigns,
and increase ROI.
Now, he's working as a Facebook ads specialist for Cat Howell.
Jason Portnoy
Before helping create magic for other brands, Jason Portnoy launched True Rivalry in
2012 and grew the brand presence in over 250 retail stores across North America.
He's recently helped take an ecom store from $2500 in sales to $100,000 in sales in 5
months and then over $350,000 in a month in under 12 months with an overall 330%
Return on Ad Spend.
Coaching/Online Courses Coaches
Michal Koziol
Michal is a geek and a nerd... but the type of nerd that can translate the nitty-gritty

-- 3 of 5 --

technical and marketing stuff to a normal human-being language.
One of his success stories is turning $25k in spend into $150k in business for a client.
Michal loves automations, integrations and all the geeky stuff out there that helps
optimize funnels.
His side hobby - creating GIFs - resulting in 50million views of his GIFs. Some call him
The Gifsmaster.
Marsha Funk
Marsha is a strategist for Funnels and Facebook Ads. She has built well over 100+
funnels that have earned businesses 5-6 figures. She was on a team managing ads
that resulted in a 7-figure launch for a well-known influencer in the online space.
Marsha's analytical and out of the box thinking has attracted both agencies and end
clients for consulting on strategies and funnel optimization, which has resulted in
lowering CPL by half and increasing ROA.
Beginner calls
Nicole Elliott
Nicole is our Operations Director across all of the Cat Howell programs. She's been
involved in FATC for over a year and runs the weekly beginner troubleshooting call.
Nicole previously worked in-house at Eight Loop (Cat's agency) before moving to New
York and working at an agency there. She now owns her own agency, serving clients in
a wide range of industries, working remotely as she travels the world.
Derek Stroh
Derek is the Founder of Horizons Digital Marketing, a marketing agency that helps
eCommerce companies build their brands and scale to 6 & 7-figures per month.
Beyond marketing, Derek has a passion for helping people, coaching and watching
others grow. That passion has led him to join the Digital Distillery team, helping in
FATC, the Incubator, and the Academy.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
